mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, which directly reduces equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rising rate periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: UNRATE crossing above 4.5% signals labor market cooling that reduces corporate profit growth expectations and causes negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 65% of triggered instances over a 5-year evaluation period.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous decline in retail sales and housing starts indicates weakening consumer demand and housing market stress, which reduces corporate revenues and drives negative S&P 500 returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint decline yields positive returns in greater than 55% of cases across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in industrial production below its 12-month moving average signals immediate supply chain disruptions that trigger short-term risk-off selling in equities.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in greater than 60% of triggered instances during the test period.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer prices combined with stable federal funds rates creates an unexpected real rate compression that boosts equity valuations as inflation outpaces nominal rate hikes.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window when real rates compress.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in nonfarm payrolls increases household income and consumer spending, driving corporate earnings growth and positive S&P 500 returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in greater than 50% of periods with positive PAYEMS growth.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth exceeding 3.0% annually signals robust economic expansion that lifts equity risk premiums and generates positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in greater than 55% of triggered instances over a 10-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising industrial production and falling unemployment indicates a tight labor market constraining production capacity, leading to short-term equity volatility and negative returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in greater than 60% of triggered instances across the evaluation window.
